events.title: Events
events.noEventsDescription: Tap + to add your first event
events.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this event?

settings.title: Settings
settings.yourDataDescription: Your events are saved only on your device. We never send your data to any server.
settings.privacyPolicyText: Smemorandum respects your privacy. The app does not collect, transmit, or share personal data with third parties. All event data is stored exclusively on your device. We do not use third-party tracking or analytics tools.
settings.cookiePolicyText: Smemorandum is a native mobile application and does not use cookies or similar tracking technologies. No browsing data is collected or stored.
settings.ownerDescription: This app is owned and developed by {{name}}. For any questions or requests, contact: {{email}}.

backup.importConfirmMessage: Your current data will be replaced with the backup data. Do you want to continue?
backup.importError: Invalid file. Please select a Smemorandum backup file.

importContacts.title: Import contacts
importContacts.noContacts: No contacts in your address book have a birthday saved.
importContacts.permissionDenied: Contacts access denied. Enable the permission in your device settings.

onboarding.slide1Description: Never forget an important anniversary or deadline again
onboarding.slide2Description: Categories, calendar and search to keep everything under control
onboarding.slide3Description: Receive sound alerts for every important event

tutorial.step1Description: Here you'll find your upcoming events organized by today, this week, and this month.
tutorial.step2Description: Tap the + button to add a new recurring event or deadline.
tutorial.step3Description: Use the bottom bar to switch between Home, Calendar, Events, and Settings.
tutorial.step4Description: Recurring events repeat over time (birthdays, anniversaries). Deadlines have a specific due date (bills, renewals).
tutorial.step5Description: Tap Calendar to see all your events in a monthly view. Tap any day to see its details.
tutorial.step6Description: In Settings you can change the language, theme, and manage your preferences.
tutorial.step7Description: Go to Settings > Data to automatically import birthdays from your contacts. No need to enter them manually!
tutorial.step8Description: Also in Settings > Data, you can export a backup of your events and restore them on another device.

manageCategories.title: Manage categories
manageCategories.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the category "{{name}}"?

common.upgradeToPremium: Upgrade to Premium to unlock this feature
